title: mine kingdom(Cookie Run: Kingdom)
description: This mod brings a wide array of items from the popular mobile game Cookie Run: Kingdom directly into your Minecraft world
body:
Introducing the Cookie Run: Kingdom Item Mod for Minecraft!

This mod brings a wide array of items from the popular mobile game Cookie Run: Kingdom directly into your Minecraft world. Get ready to add new layers of fun and strategic depth to your gameplay. Now, you can search for traces of cookies and utilize the resources of the Kingdom to enhance your building and adventuring experience in Minecraft!

 

To run the mod, the GeckoLib mod is required.

 
 
Concise & Direct:

"Various cookie weapons and multiple new systems are planned."
More Detailed:

"We're planning to add a wide array of cookie-inspired weapons, along with several new systems."
"Expect a variety of cookie weapon additions and the implementation of numerous new systems."
Emphasizing Future Development:

"Future updates will introduce a diverse range of cookie weapons and various new systems."
"We're set to add more cookie-themed weapons and expand the mod with several additional systems."
If you want to make a mod together, feel free to join the Discord!
Discord:https:https://discord.gg/8VkWxbvBp3
Designer:sanguineDragon

Developer:sho

The Mine Kingdom(Cookie Run: Kingdom) Team
